comment:
(Translated by Google) It's a company with a lot of work and a lot of experience; the best thing about this company is that they treat people well.

(Original)
Es una compañia de mucho trabajo y de Mucha experience es lo mejor de esta company que tratan bien ala gente
draft_response: Bernabe, thank you. Hearing that the work on your property delivered the results you expected confirms we are doing our job right. We look forward to continuing to serve your property.
